description: A planner must select the best ISR asset to find a mobile surface-to-air missile (SAM) launcher hidden in a forested area.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the intelligence on the target type and the terrain (dense forest).

expected_outcome.value: Planner understands the difficulty of finding a mobile, hidden target in foliage.

nodes.task_description: Query available ISR assets and their sensor capabilities (e.g., standard video, thermal, synthetic aperture radar).

expected_outcome.value: Planner gets a list of available assets and their sensor payloads.

nodes.task_description: Select a drone equipped with synthetic aperture radar (SAR), which can penetrate foliage, as the optimal asset for the mission.

expected_outcome.value: Planner makes the correct technical decision to use a SAR-equipped platform.
